description: dlfcn boundary policy for the native phase-1 loader/resolver surface with explicit guard rails and auditable enforcement.

replacement_profile.transition_requirement: dlfcn_abi must remain free of direct host dlopen/dlsym/dlclose call-through before L2 replacement claims

support_matrix_contract.strict_semantics: Native phase-1 loader/resolver surface with thread-local dlerror contract and deterministic local main-program handle semantics
support_matrix_contract.hardened_semantics: Native phase-1 loader/resolver surface with RTLD_NOW healing for invalid dlopen flags and deterministic dlerror behavior

strict_semantics_by_symbol.dlopen: Native phase-1 loader: NULL and recognized libc NOLOAD aliases return a local main-program handle; unsupported libraries return NULL with thread-local dlerror
strict_semantics_by_symbol.dlsym: Native exported-symbol resolver for RTLD_DEFAULT, RTLD_NEXT, and the local main-program handle with thread-local dlerror on misses
strict_semantics_by_symbol.dlclose: Native main-program handle close with deterministic refcounted invalid-handle rejection and thread-local dlerror contract

hardened_semantics_by_symbol.dlopen: Native phase-1 loader: invalid flags heal to RTLD_NOW and NULL / recognized libc NOLOAD aliases return a local main-program handle; unsupported libraries return NULL with thread-local dlerror
hardened_semantics_by_symbol.dlsym: Native exported-symbol resolver for RTLD_DEFAULT, RTLD_NEXT, and the local main-program handle with deterministic invalid-handle / symbol-miss dlerror behavior
hardened_semantics_by_symbol.dlclose: Native main-program handle close with deterministic refcounted invalid-handle rejection and thread-local dlerror contract

support_matrix_contract.dlerror_strict_semantics: Native thread-local dlerror: returns last dl* error message and clears error state per POSIX
support_matrix_contract.dlerror_hardened_semantics: Native thread-local dlerror with deterministic error-message return and state clearing

README.md: Interpose (`L0/L1`): `dlopen`, `dlsym`, `dlclose`, and `dlerror` stay inside FrankenLibC's native phase-1 loader boundary for supported handles and exported symbols.
Hardened invalid `dlopen` flags heal to `RTLD_NOW` before local phase-1 resolution.
Replacement (`L2/L3`) forbids direct host `dlopen`/`dlsym`/`dlclose` fallback paths; any residual call-through is a release-blocking gate failure.
FEATURE_PARITY.md: dlfcn boundary policy: native phase-1 `dlopen`/`dlsym`/`dlclose`/`dlerror`, hardened invalid-flags repair is `RTLD_NOW`, replacement forbids direct host fallback
